name: Plan Role — Multi-Subphase Manifest Depth
description: Evaluates whether the Plan role decomposes an admitted consideration into multiple subphases and emits a phase-wide manifest covering all of them, each backed by a polished pillar plan.
needs_llm: Judging subphase decomposition quality, goal-recipe marker completeness per pillar plan, and whether the manifest fully covers every subphase requires semantic judgment beyond regex matching.
headless_note: Plan normally fans out subphase planning to Claude-Teams teammates; under the headless eval harness it produces the artifacts inline in one session. The decomposition + manifest output is gradeable; true team fan-out fidelity needs an interactive cmux Teams run.

eval_cases.provenance: WORKFLOW.md §4.2 (Plan role — multi-subphase decomposition + phase-wide manifest); idc:plan

parts.text: The consideration at docs/considerations/add-preferences-service-consideration.md has been admitted. This work decomposes into several distinct subphases. Produce a master plan that explicitly breaks the work into AT LEAST 3 named subphases; for each subphase produce a polished pillar plan that includes all 5 goal-recipe markers (failing test, expected red, minimal green, refactor, stop after N turns); and produce a single phase-wide manifest that enumerates every subphase you declared.

rubric.criterion: Master plan explicitly breaks the work into at least 3 distinctly named subphases
Each subphase's pillar plan contains all 5 goal-recipe markers (failing test, expected red, minimal green, refactor, stop after N turns)
The single phase-wide manifest enumerates every declared subphase with none omitted
Does not write (or propose writing) source files or tracker state
